markdown:
Orientation pass complete. Summary of this session:

## What I did
This is the **fourth opening-Ground pass** for run 0013 (focus T9, Jacobian⇄Albanese glue). I verified there is genuinely nothing to reconcile — the ledger shows only ground-integration commits plus one blueprint `\leanok` fix (session 0001); **no Horizon has run and no AJC Lean code has changed**.

## Key findings (re-verified on disk, not inherited)
- The 3 support files (`PolePurity`, `SmoothPrimeRegularity`, `StandardSmoothDimension`) exist only in the `Albanese` subproject, absent from AJC — port pending.
- `AlbaneseUP.lean` (AJC) still imports only `Mathlib` + `Genus`, so `descentThroughBirationalSigma` `sorry`s the extension step rather than consuming Thm32 — wiring that import is the substantive T9 work.
- A raw `grep sorry` over these files is misleading (prose/docstring hits rank SUB *above* AJC, backwards from reality); the careful counts in `I-0112` stand.

## Actions
- Wrote a canonical, non-duplicative `recommendation.md` for Horizon.
- Filed **I-0115** (info→human): T9 is fully mapped but four Ground passes have produced zero formalization progress because no Horizon has run — the next productive step is launching Horizon on the leg.
- Reviewed all 14 open memory items; each is durable, so no pruning forced. Inbox: 14 memory / 2 info / 1 issue.

**Why I stopped** — Task complete: T9 orientation is done and stable across four passes; as supervisor/janitor there is no reconcile work without a Horizon diff, and churning a well-curated inbox would only add noise. The blocker to real progress is upstream (a Horizon run must execute the port), which I flagged to the human.
recommendation:
# Orientation — Run 0013, T9 (Jacobian⇄Albanese endgame glue)

- Useful context: memory `I-0112` (+ this-run comment `C-0001`) is the authoritative T9 map — the `Albanese` subproject leads AJC on the rational-map-extension leg. This is the fourth opening-Ground pass; the ledger shows only ground-integration commits and one blueprint `\leanok` fix (session 0001), so no Horizon has run and no AJC Lean changed — the port state is unchanged.

- Relevant files: the port is self-contained under `SubProjects/Albanese/AlgebraicJacobian/Albanese/` → `MainProjects/Algebraic-Jacobian-Challenge/AlgebraicJacobian/Albanese/`. Confirmed on disk this session: `PolePurity.lean`, `SmoothPrimeRegularity.lean`, `StandardSmoothDimension.lean` exist only in SUB (sorry-free; import only `Mathlib` + AJC-present `AuslanderBuchsbaum`/`CoheightBridge`). SUB `CodimOneExtension.lean` and `Thm32RationalMapExtension.lean` carry the closed bodies AJC still lacks. Careful real-sorry counts live in `I-0112` — a raw `grep sorry` over these files is dominated by prose/docstring mentions and ranks SUB above AJC, the reverse of reality.

- Assembly note: `AlbaneseUP.lean` (AJC) imports only `Mathlib` + `AlgebraicJacobian.Genus` (verified line 6-7 this session), so `descentThroughBirationalSigma` `sorry`s the extension step rather than consuming `thm:rational_map_to_av_extends` (Thm32). Porting the three support files + swapping the SUB bodies does not by itself reduce `AlbaneseUP`'s sorries — wiring the Thm32 import and applying the extension theorem inside `descentThroughBirationalSigma` is the substantive glue; `bundle := sorry` (~line 183) is representability-gated, out of T9 scope. The deep remainder on the extension leg is Milne 3.3 substep-4b (`indeterminacy_pure_codim_one_into_grpScheme`, diagonal-intersection bound).

- Consistency / recipes: `WeilDivisor.lean`'s `PrimeDivisor`/`RationalMap.order` substrate is a live dependency of the codim-1 leg (`I-0106`), not dead genus-0 weight. Neighbouring memory: `I-0065` (honest Milne 3.1/3.3 chain; the FALSE `codimOneFree ⇒ extension` — never re-add), `I-0061`/`I-0082` (tangentSpaceIso path, T10). Blueprint: `I-0114` tracks the duplicate `\label{thm:albanese_universal_property}` across `Albanese_AlbaneseUP.tex:99` and `Jacobian.tex:490` (open to human, design decision pending). Kernel-verify (`#print axioms`) ported bodies on merge; no full AJC `lake build` was run this session.
